raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Samarijas Pilsshaftôs bija / ko
tee Israëta Kehnina bij darrijschi/
to KUNGII apkaitinadami/ un
wiꞥſch darrija teem ta patt/ ka
wiꞥſch Betelē bij darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch nokawe wiſſus
Angstunu Swehtitajus/ kas tur
bija/ us teem Altareim/ un ta-
dedsinaja Zilweku Kauns us
teem/ pehz nahze wiꞥſch atkat
us Jerusalemi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas Kehniisch paweh-
leja wiſſeim Landim/ fazzidams:
Turrajt tam KUNGAM juh-
fam Deewam tohs Paffa-
Swehtkus/ ittin ka fchihs Derri-
bas Grahmata rakſtihts irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tahdr Paffa-Sweht-
ki ka fchee/ ne bija turreti tappu-
schi nei Sohgo Laikā/ kas Israë-
lw teefaja/ nei wiſſu Israëta
Kehnina/ nei to Kehnina no Juh-
da Laikā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet astotapadefinitā Gad-
dā ta Kehnina Josijus/ tappe
fchee Paffa-Swehtki tam KUN-
GAM Jerusaleme turreti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Josijus atmette arri-
dsan tohs Sihluekus un Sih-
mes-Zeenitajus/ tohs Tehlus/ un
Elkus/ un wiſſas Negantibas/
kas eekſch tahs Semmes Juhda
un Jerusaleme tappereſetas/ ka
wiꞥſch stipri turretu tohs Bauſ-
libas Wahrdus/ kas tai Grah-
matā rakſtiti bij/ ko tas Preeste-
ris Ilkijus ta KUNGA Nam-
mā btj atraddis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un preekſch winna ne bija
tahds Kehniisch tahds wiꞥſch bi-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "jis/ kas pee to KUNGII buht
atgreeſees no wiſſas fauwa
Sirde/ un no wiſſas fauwa
Dwehfeles/ un ar wiſſu fauwa
Spehku/ pehz wiſſas Mohsu
Bauſlibas/ un pehz winnu arr
dsan tahds/ka wiꞥſch ne zehlahe
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tatschu tas KUNG-
ne atgreeſahs no fauwas leela
Dufmibas/ ar ko winna Bah-
fiba prett Juhdu bija eedeggufi
wiſſas Apkaitischanas deht/
ko Manassus winnu bij apka-
tinajs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Untas KUNGē fazzija: G-
atmettischu arridsan Juhdu
mannu Waiga/ ittin ka es Isr-
elu atmettis/ un mettischu fo-
Pilsshaftu nohst/ ko es biju isr-
dsejs/ prohti Jerusalemi/ un
Nammu/ no ka es biju fazztij
Mans Wahrdstur buhs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Josiji
Lectahin atleek/ un wiſſ/
wiꞥſch irr darrijs/ tas irr rakſtiht
to Kehnina no Juhda Laik-
Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Winna Laikā zehlahs W-
raus Nekus tas Egiptes Ke-
nisch/ prett to Kehnina no Af-
rijas pee tahs Uppes Wrat. U-
tas Kehniisch Josijus gahje ta-
pretti/ un tas Egiptes Kehnin-
nokawe to eekſch Megiddus/ k-
tas ar winnu bandijahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winna Kalpi no we-
de to ( tik ne) nomirrinchu
Megiddus/ un wedde to us Je-
rusalemi/ un aprakke to win-
Kappa. Un tahs Semnes La-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
